entries.title: Lifecycle duration and agent-hours profile

band_definitions.note: Evidence-period sum of observed inter-record gaps no greater than 30 minutes; longer gaps contribute zero; 160h-plus is top-coded
Evidence-period sum of each covered session's observed open-to-close interval; overlapping sessions are summed; 160h-plus is top-coded
Sessions with both an observed open and observed or versioned scan-inferred close divided by all admitted sessions
Boundary-covered sessions with complete observed_at coverage across eligible structural records divided by all admitted sessions
THREAT_MODEL v0.2.1 section 3.4 backfill floor; never discloses the exact anchored span

entries.neutrality_note: Lifecycle volume only; it does not measure utility, quality, productivity, or raw compute and never publishes a session point or exact total
entries.notes: Activated only after the MYB-19.7 owner ruling landed as THREAT_MODEL v0.2.1. Report location: fingerprint catalog_metrics. Required caveats are output-schema constants. Codex close normalizer v1 uses only a timestamped structural task_complete record; absent terminal evidence is UNKNOWN.

caveat_copy.capture-dependent-and-inflatable: Capture-derived duration bands depend on observed lifecycle markers and may be inflated by incomplete close evidence.
caveat_copy.observed-at-coverage-limits-backfill: Coverage limits and backfilled history qualify these duration bands.

entries.risk_note: Even coarse duration volume can reveal work-pattern intensity in combination with other disclosures; exact totals, session points, identifiers, and timestamps stay local

entries.title: Recurring workflow phase sequences

band_definitions.note: Distinct supporting episodes divided by eligible episodes; sequences below k=5 are absent

entries.neutrality_note: Aggregate recurring structure only; no per-episode stream or identifier is disclosed

entries.title: Observed task episode total
entries.neutrality_note: Exact corpus-level total from versioned episode identities; no episode point or identifier is disclosed
entries.notes: MYB-13.3 source for the future observed-task-episode badge claim

entries.title: Workflow phase transition shares

band_definitions.note: Cell count divided by all outgoing transitions from its source phase; cells below five transitions are absent

entries.neutrality_note: Corpus-level first-order phase shares characterize workflow shape without exposing an ordered episode stream
entries.notes: MYB-13.3; UNKNOWN breaks adjacency and is never bridged

entries.title: Workflow phase authorship shares

band_definitions.note: Authorship-tagged events divided by events in the same phase; cells below five events are absent

entries.neutrality_note: Subject-type-neutral activity shares characterize event attribution and never grade either source
entries.notes: MYB-13.3 over MYB-10.4 authorship tags

entries.title: Workflow phase model routing shares

band_definitions.note: Events routed to a pinned public model class divided by events in the same phase; cells below five events are absent

entries.neutrality_note: Model routing is operational metadata and never a trust anchor or capability claim
entries.risk_note: A routing profile can narrow workflow identity in combination; raw model/provider strings and thin cells remain private
entries.notes: MYB-13.3; unrecognized model strings reduce to other and missing routing to UNKNOWN

entries.title: Structural rework loop rate

band_definitions.note: Episodes containing a pinned BUILD/TEST/DEBUG to PLAN/BUILD backward edge divided by episodes with at least one known phase; zero eligible evidence is UNKNOWN and partial support below five is absent

entries.neutrality_note: A structural loop frequency describes workflow shape and is not framed as an error, deficit, or quality judgment
entries.notes: MYB-13.3 pinned structural edge set version 1.0.0; descriptor 1.0.1 corrects denominator eligibility and UNKNOWN/support behavior

entries.title: Workflow context-boundary transition rate

band_definitions.note: Known phase transitions crossing a context generation divided by known phase transitions with context identity coverage

entries.neutrality_note: Aggregate boundary frequency only; no position, timestamp, session, or episode sequence is disclosed
entries.notes: MYB-13.3 consumes ADR-0013 context identities

entries.title: Workflow-map phase coverage

band_definitions.note: UNKNOWN-classified events divided by classified events; never suppressed because it qualifies the graph
Weaker of known-phase event coverage and episode-with-events coverage

entries.neutrality_note: UNKNOWN remains explicit and lowers graph confidence rather than being treated as zero or hidden
entries.notes: MYB-13.3 workflow-map evidence qualifier

entries.title: Model-role evidence quality

band_definitions.note: Events carrying the requested metadata divided by eligible events in the same role phase.
LOW below 50 percent coverage, MEDIUM below 75 percent, HIGH otherwise, UNKNOWN without a denominator.
Available requires complete coverage; partial preserves known denominators with missing metadata; unknown has no denominator.

entries.neutrality_note: Coverage qualifies the evidence and never substitutes missing metadata with a zero activity claim.
entries.notes: MYB-13.5 evidence-quality atom; model and effort also feed the MYB-13.8 contribution contract.

entries.title: Fresh context-session rate

band_definitions.note: Startup-triggered sessions divided by sessions with a known start trigger
Sessions with a known start trigger divided by eligible sessions
Pinned confidence function over start-trigger coverage

entries.neutrality_note: Aggregate lifecycle frequency only; session identities and start positions remain private
entries.notes: MYB-13.4 context definition 1.0.0; missing start triggers reduce coverage and never become observed non-fresh activity

entries.title: Resumed context-session rate

band_definitions.note: Resume-triggered sessions divided by sessions with a known start trigger
Sessions with a known start trigger divided by eligible sessions
Pinned confidence function over start-trigger coverage

entries.neutrality_note: Aggregate lifecycle frequency only; session identities and resume positions remain private
entries.notes: MYB-13.4 context definition 1.0.0; missing start triggers reduce coverage and never enter the rate denominator

entries.title: Clear-triggered context-generation rate

band_definitions.note: Clear-triggered generations divided by generations with a known trigger
Generations with a known trigger divided by structurally observed generations
Pinned confidence function over generation-trigger coverage

entries.neutrality_note: Aggregate clear frequency describes context handling without exposing a boundary position
entries.notes: MYB-13.4 context definition 1.0.0; unknown generation triggers reduce coverage

entries.title: Manual compaction count band

band_definitions.note: Count of observed compaction boundaries classified manual; emitted only when every observed compaction trigger is known
Compaction candidates with a manual or automatic trigger divided by observed compaction candidates
Pinned confidence function over compaction-trigger coverage

entries.neutrality_note: Only an evidence-period aggregate count band is disclosed; no session or boundary position is retained
entries.notes: MYB-13.4 context definition 1.0.0; a partial manual-versus-auto classification makes the count UNKNOWN

entries.title: Automatic compaction count band

band_definitions.note: Count of observed compaction boundaries classified automatic; emitted only when every observed compaction trigger is known
Compaction candidates with a manual or automatic trigger divided by observed compaction candidates
Pinned confidence function over compaction-trigger coverage

entries.neutrality_note: Only an evidence-period aggregate count band is disclosed; no session or boundary position is retained
entries.notes: MYB-13.4 context definition 1.0.0; a partial manual-versus-auto classification makes the count UNKNOWN

entries.title: Context generations per task episode

band_definitions.note: Sum of observed session-scoped context generations within each explicitly stitched episode
Covered episodes in a generation-count band divided by episodes with complete generation coverage
Episodes whose every member session has a reliable generation marker divided by eligible episodes
Pinned confidence function over episode generation coverage

entries.neutrality_note: The output is a corpus distribution only; no episode point, identity, or ordered boundary stream is disclosed
entries.notes: MYB-13.4 context definition 1.0.0 over ADR-0013 episode and context identities

entries.title: Single-context task-episode rate

band_definitions.note: Episodes with exactly one observed context generation divided by episodes with complete generation coverage
Episodes whose every member session has a reliable generation marker divided by eligible episodes
Pinned confidence function over episode generation coverage

entries.neutrality_note: The rate describes context shape and is not an effectiveness or quality measure
entries.notes: MYB-13.4 context definition 1.0.0; missing generation identity excludes an episode from the denominator and lowers coverage

entries.title: Fresh-session planning and implementation split

band_definitions.note: Pinned coarse group of the first known workflow phase in a startup-triggered session
Fresh sessions in the phase group divided by fresh sessions
Fresh sessions with a known PLAN or implementation phase divided by fresh sessions
Pinned confidence function over fresh-session phase coverage

entries.neutrality_note: Coarse corpus shares characterize where fresh sessions begin without exposing a session sequence or request meaning
entries.notes: MYB-13.4 uses workflow phase classifier 1.0.0; TASK or absent known phase remains UNKNOWN

entries.title: Model-change rate across context boundaries

band_definitions.note: Observed context boundaries whose nearest model observations on each side differ, divided by boundaries with model coverage on both sides
Context boundaries with model observations on both sides divided by observed context boundaries
Pinned confidence function over boundary model coverage

entries.neutrality_note: Model names are compared privately; only a corpus-level band is emitted and provider metadata is never trust language
entries.risk_note: A context-boundary routing pattern can narrow workflow identity in combination; model strings and boundary positions remain private
entries.notes: MYB-13.4 context definition 1.0.0; missing or conflicting model evidence lowers coverage and never becomes no-change

entries.title: Local estimated public list-price equivalent by model

entries.title: Local estimated public list-price equivalent per episode

band_definitions.note: Local distribution of episode estimates in fixed log buckets; $1000+ is top-coded and no episode id or point is retained

entries.neutrality_note: A local bucketed standardized token-rate estimate only; it is not an invoice, actual spend, Mybench price, compute quantity, or quality signal
entries.notes: MYB-13.6; unknown or ambiguous episode mappings remain an explicit unknown count and no per-episode value or identity is emitted

caveat_copy.provider-reported-inflatable: This public-list-price-equivalent uses provider-reported token counts that may be inflated and is not an invoice or actual spend.

entries.title: Planning-to-implementation token ratio

band_definitions.note: Aggregate PLAN tokens divided by BUILD/TEST/DEBUG/REVIEW/COMMIT tokens using integer cross-multiplication; denominator zero is UNKNOWN

entries.neutrality_note: A coarse structural allocation ratio only; no band is preferred and it does not measure quality or efficiency
entries.notes: MYB-13.6; requires five episodes carrying both planning and implementation-attributed tokens

caveat_copy.provider-reported-inflatable: Token counts are provider-reported, capture-dependent, and potentially inflatable.

entries.title: Structural rework token share

band_definitions.note: Tokens in the phase entered by a pinned backward structural edge divided by all phase-attributed tokens

entries.neutrality_note: A structural loop allocation only; re-entry is not framed as an error, deficit, inefficiency, or quality judgment
entries.notes: MYB-13.6; backward edges are BUILD/TEST/DEBUG to PLAN/BUILD and UNKNOWN never bridges evidence

caveat_copy.provider-reported-inflatable: Token counts are provider-reported, capture-dependent, and potentially inflatable.

entries.title: Structurally abandoned-session token share

band_definitions.note: Tokens in sessions belonging to structurally abandoned episodes divided by tokens in sessions with a deterministic closed or abandoned outcome

entries.neutrality_note: A content-opaque structural outcome share only; abandoned is not a semantic guess and does not imply failure or quality
entries.notes: MYB-13.6 consumes normalized episode outcome classifier v1; unknown outcomes are excluded from numerator and denominator

caveat_copy.provider-reported-inflatable: Token counts are provider-reported, capture-dependent, and potentially inflatable.

rejected.topic: raw lexical statistics (type-token ratio, readability scores, vocabulary-size estimates)
rejected.rationale: confounded (expert terseness, LLM-drafted human turns, native-language advantage), stylometric fingerprints (R2), and trivially inflatable — rejected as disclosures per handoff §7.2

banned as descriptor titles, ids, or copy anywhere in the product; this data source cannot support trait claims and a hiring-signal product emitting cognitive-ability proxies invites adverse-impact scrutiny (handoff §8.6; OQ #33 legal review)

rejected.topic: tokens-per-line or any composite developer-effectiveness score
rejected.rationale: roadmap explicit v0 non-goals: no ranking users on tokens per line, no composite score; token-per-line is a diagnostic, not a quality measure (roadmap Stage 1 §6)

rejected.topic: ordered event sequences and per-session point values
rejected.rationale: metrics-v0 pinned exclusions: distributions/aggregates only; ordered sequences and per-session values leak activity shape. THREAT_MODEL v0.2.1 admits only control-bound aggregates and top-coded headline bands; it does not admit ordered streams or exact point/extreme values

rejected.topic: utility, quality, or effectiveness judgments inferred from deterministic activity structure
rejected.rationale: structural counts, bands, and histograms support descriptive workflow claims only; usefulness, correctness, quality, and effectiveness are JUDGED interpretations and remain unadmitted pending the MYB-7 governance track
timezone/lifestyle leak (metrics-v0 exclusion; OQ #11 lineage); coarsest useful grain only
